author: y4rr
content: Plan: F1 sprint — 4-issue batch (#904 #976 #905 #977). Steps: (1) Update regenerate_nn_attention_fixtures.py to rename encoder attn_ keys → weight_ keys, add ffn_w3 to encoder and decoder, regenerate expected_output using SwiGLU 3-weight math. (2) Update regenerate_flex_attention_fixtures.py to emit slope field in alibi fixture. (3) Run both scripts. (4) Update conformance_nn_attention.rs: flip ENCODER_DECODER_FIXTURE_KEY_MISMATCH and FLEX_ALIBI_SLOPE_MISMATCH to false, update alibi arm to read slope from fixture.
